strategy: Star boss (2570). Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+15%); avoid Fire, Ice, and Storm (25% resist).
Do not trap her. A Trap on the boss makes her buff her whole team with +30% damage, +20% accuracy, +10% pierce, and +30% healing. Use blades on yourself instead.
She summons a Clockworker minion at the start; clear it or AoE both.
Stack self-blades and land a Myth, Life, or Death hit. She is fragile.
cheatNotes: Late joiners get Mana Burned. Be in on round 1.
She summons a Clockworker minion at the start. Plan to clear it or hit both with AoE.
Placing any Trap on her buffs her entire team (+30% damage, +20% accuracy, +10% pierce, +30% healing). Never trap her; blade yourself instead.
